name: Copper soil sensor (CueR + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects bioavailable copper Cu(I)/Cu(II) in soil and water. The CueR copper-responsive regulator gates a CRISPRi circuit driving a visible chromoprotein, in the robust environmental chassis P. putida KT2440.

input.detects: Bioavailable copper in soil/water (agricultural and mining contamination)
input.operatingRange: CueR-family sensors respond from sub-µM copper

sensing.sensorMechanism: CueR (a MerR-family regulator) binds Cu(I) and activates the copper-responsive PcopA/PcueO promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: Cu -> CueR activates PcopA -> transcribes an anti-pigment sgRNA -> dCas9 + sgRNA repress a constitutive amilCP cassette (CRISPRi) -> pigment fades as copper rises (NOT gate). Pair an inverter for colour-on output.

parts.name: CueR regulator
parts.source: E. coli cue system (MerR family); P. putida CopR/CueR homologs

performance.notes: CueR copper sensors and P. putida CRISPRi are validated separately; integrated device is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: P. putida KT2440 is a certified HV1 safety host; add a containment circuit for field use.
safety.notes: Robust soil chassis; instrument-free pigment readout.

buildSteps.title: Design anti-reporter sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the amilCP promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: CueR. TU2: PcopA -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9 + constitutive amilCP. Clone into SEVA vectors.

buildSteps.title: Transform P. putida KT2440
buildSteps.description: Electroporate; select; confirm baseline pigment without copper.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Add soil eluate/water + copper standard curve.

buildSteps.title: Score colour
buildSteps.description: Compare pigment to the curve by eye or camera.

provenance.source: Design template combining a CueR copper-sensing module with P. putida CRISPRi
partsSources: Stoyanov et al. 2001 / CueR copper sensing (E. coli cue system)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
